definition: functions performed by the assembly in addition to its essential functions and capabilities

definition_ml.en: functions performed by the assembly in addition to its essential functions and capabilities
definition_ml.fr: fonctions exercées par l'ensemble en plus de ses fonctions et capacités essentielles

note: Typical essential functions and capability are switching loads, over-current protections and short-circuit withstand.

note_ml.en: Typical essential functions and capability are switching loads, over-current protections and short-circuit withstand.
note_ml.fr: Les fonctions et capacités essentielles typiques sont la commutation de charges, les protections contre les surintensités et la tenue aux courts-circuits.

remark: This block of properties should be reserved for those if no other appropriate properties are made available.

remark_ml.en: This block of properties should be reserved for those if no other appropriate properties are made available.
remark_ml.fr: Ce bloc de propriétés doit être réservé à celles qui ne disposent pas d'autres propriétés appropriées.
